ksa_text: Skill in conducting market research and user research using quantitative and qualitative methods, including survey design, competitor analysis, secondary data analysis, and synthesis of findings into actionable recommendations.

Skill in conducting reviews of systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Applied Analytics & BI is a primary or secondary domain for the Director of Analytics. This skill KSA is within scope for the role's expected competency profile and seniority level (director).

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Applied Analytics & BI), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Framework signal is weak (composite 0.432). External validation of this skill KSA for the Director of Analytics role relies primarily on domain-level alignment rather than specific framework matches.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Gartner analytics maturity model and BI leadership surveys confirm applied analytics and BI competencies for analytics leadership.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: domain-level relevance of Applied Analytics & BI for the Director of Analytics is corroborated by DAMA-DMBOK, CDO survey data, and role-specific job market analysis, despite weak cross-framework signal.

decision_rationale: Applied Analytics & BI skill KSA is within scope for the Director of Analytics at the director tier. Seniority fit is appropriate. All three evaluation passes support inclusion.
